description.en: Retrieve information about a GitHub repository including description, stars, forks, and language.
description.de: Ruft Informationen über ein GitHub-Repository ab, einschließlich Beschreibung, Stars, Forks und Sprache.
description.es: Retrieve information about a GitHub repository including description, stars, forks, and language.
description.fr: Retrieve information about a GitHub repository including description, stars, forks, and language.
description.ro: Retrieve information about a GitHub repository including description, stars, forks, and language.
description.it: Retrieve information about a GitHub repository including description, stars, forks, and language.

vars.API_KEY: env:GITHUB_TOKEN|Get your personal access token from https://github.com/settings/tokens

description.en: The owner of the repository (username or organization).
description.es: El propietario del repositorio (nombre de usuario u organización).
description.fr: Le propriétaire du référentiel (nom d'utilisateur ou organisation).
description.ro: Proprietarul depozitului (nume de utilizator sau organizație).
description.it: Il proprietario del repository (nome utente o organizzazione).
